content.text: NOT done — the goal is unmet: 18 eval scenarios are still red and 3 follow-ups are still open, and none is externally blocked. I will not write these off as baseline variance or out of scope; that would be exactly the cheating the directive forbids. Under a 100%-green mandate I keep driving. Dispatching a fix for the first red scenario now.

input.prompt: In a fresh worktree off origin/main, drive the first still-red eval scenario to green: reproduce the red, write the failing test first, implement the fix, run the suite, commit, and open a PR. Report the branch and PR.
